# Xenium

> Xenium is a premium personalized digital gifting service based in India. We hand-craft cinematic digital experiences — combining photos, video, music, written messages and animated text into a single private link — for birthdays, anniversaries, proposals, memorials, retirements and corporate appreciation moments. Orders placed before 12 PM IST are delivered the same day; otherwise within 24 hours. All experiences are ₹750.

A Xenium is not a card, a slideshow, a video editor or a template. It is a custom-designed microsite built around one specific person and one specific story. Recipients open it on their phone, scroll through the experience, and keep the link forever.

## Pages

- [Home](https://xenium-sites.com/): Overview, how it works, occasions, examples, pricing, FAQ, request form
- [Sample Birthday Experience](https://xenium-sites.com/experience/birthday): Full preview of a birthday Xenium
- [Sample Anniversary Experience](https://xenium-sites.com/experience/anniversary): Full preview of a 10-year anniversary Xenium
- [Sample Proposal Experience](https://xenium-sites.com/experience/proposal): Full preview of a proposal Xenium
- [Sample Memorial Experience](https://xenium-sites.com/experience/memorial): Full preview of a memorial tribute Xenium
- [Sample Retirement Experience](https://xenium-sites.com/experience/retirement): Full preview of a retirement Xenium
- [Sample Corporate Experience](https://xenium-sites.com/experience/corporate): Full preview of an employee appreciation Xenium
- [Privacy Policy](https://xenium-sites.com/privacy): Data handling, retention, user rights
- [Terms of Service](https://xenium-sites.com/terms): Order terms, refunds, content rights, governing law

## Pricing

- Single tier: ₹750 INR for the complete Xenium experience
- Includes: up to 15 photos and videos, personalized messages, background music, private shareable link, mobile-optimized design, timeline, animated text, QR code, guest messages, priority delivery
- Delivery: same-day if ordered before 12 PM IST, otherwise within 24 hours of payment confirmation
- Guarantee: 100% Happiness Guarantee — free unlimited revisions or a full refund
- Payment: UPI, debit/credit cards, net banking via secure payment partner

## Contact

- Email: xeniumgifts@gmail.com
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/xenium.sites/

## What makes Xenium different

- Hand-crafted by humans, not template-generated
- Cinematic design language with custom animations
- Multi-sensory: photos, video, music and animated text
- Private link with optional password protection — no recipient sign-up required
- Built for India: WhatsApp-shareable, INR pricing, India-cultural sensitivity for occasions
